target_destination_ledger.public_safe_note: TASK-027T visually reached the session journal destination through a loaded catalog/grid focus oracle followed by lateral rail recovery. The observed journal state was blank/empty; this is visual destination coverage, not proof of populated session history.

target_destination_ledger.public_safe_note: TASK-027T visually reached the Steam/top-up QR destination. The QR target was decoded local-only as an HTTPS-category target, stored only as local evidence metadata, and was not followed.

prior_blockers: TASK-027S app shell loader after launcher entry
target_destination_ledger.public_safe_note: TASK-027T visually reached the feedback QR destination. The QR target was decoded local-only as an HTTPS-category target, stored only as local evidence metadata, and was not followed.

route_gate_ledger.public_safe_note: TASK-027T reached a loaded actionable catalog state before route assertions. The launcher-entry app-shell loader was not used as the starting state.

TASK-027T did not encounter, use or count the TASK-027S app-shell-loader state as catalog or destination coverage. This row is an exclusion guard with a 120-second timeout policy, not loader recovery coverage.
Fresh TASK-027T public-safe checkpoint IDs support the three target destination coverage claims.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Initial launch attempt followed by visual checkpoint.
anomaly_records.expected_result: A loaded app catalog or recoverable app state appears.
anomaly_records.observed_result: The checkpoint showed an external Android TV ambient/screensaver surface, not app navigation content.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely Android TV ambient/screensaver interruption during launch or wake state
anomaly_records.recovery_action: Classified as external/system evidence and recovered through explicit app launch.
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Do not count ambient/system surfaces as app screens or destination coverage.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Capture screenshot through unsafe Windows shell redirection and a conflicting local helper name.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Valid screenshot checkpoint files are produced.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Initial screenshot handling was not usable until recaptured with a binary-safe process stream; one helper name collided with a shell alias and skipped intended intermediate capture.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: local tooling issue in binary stream handling and shell alias selection
anomaly_records.recovery_action: Recaptured screenshots with a binary-safe helper and continued from visually verified checkpoints.
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Runtime checkpoints must validate screenshot integrity before they count as evidence.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: From loaded catalog, attempt journal route with D-pad movement and center activation.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Focus moves to the journal route or the journal destination opens.
anomaly_records.observed_result: The visual checkpoint stayed on the catalog with games rail state selected.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely focus acquisition mismatch while XML reports no focused node
anomaly_records.recovery_action: Switched to a grid-focus then lateral rail recovery oracle.
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Do not rely on direct D-pad rail attempts from catalog without a proven focus oracle.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Tap the UI-tree-derived session journal rail bounds from loaded catalog.
anomaly_records.observed_result: The checkpoint remained on the catalog despite XML exposing the rail label bounds.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely non-clickable rail text node or touch/focus routing mismatch
anomaly_records.recovery_action: Used the TASK-020/TASK-023-style grid focus plus D-pad left oracle instead.
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: XML node visibility is not sufficient as an activation oracle when nodes are focusable but not clickable.

checkpoint_modality_audit.public_safe_note: TASK-027T runtime checkpoints were captured local-only with screenshots and XML. Binary-safe screenshot capture was used after an unsafe redirect anomaly.

unverified_areas: root cause of rail no-op before grid-focus oracle
